final-capstone-file-room-handoff.label: Capstone: File Room Handoff
final-capstone-file-room-handoff.summary: Use the Linux terminal to turn a messy event workspace into a clean handoff: inspect what is there, sort files into the right folders, protect an important note with a backup, remove temporary clutter, and leave a clear ready marker.

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.title: Inventory the file-room inbox
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.prompt: You are starting the final event handoff and need a quick record of what arrived. Check the inbox, then create `community-file-room/handoff/inventory.txt` to mark that the intake review happened.
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.hint: This is a cumulative project step. Start from the previous workspace and add only the requested change.

help.concept: Project steps are connected. Preserve earlier deliverables and add one useful new piece of work.
help.hint_1: Use ls or find to check the current workspace before changing it.
help.hint_2: Do not delete files from earlier steps unless the prompt explicitly asks you to clean up a temporary file.

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.starterCode: # Use the terminal for this Linux project step.

0.message: Do not use sudo for beginner workspace tasks.

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.title: Sort agenda, guests, and venue notes
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.prompt: The inbox still has loose event files. Create `community-file-room/agenda`, `community-file-room/guests`, and `community-file-room/venue`, then move `agenda.txt`, `guest-list.txt`, and `venue.txt` out of `community-file-room/inbox` into their matching folders.
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.hint: This is a cumulative project step. Start from the previous workspace and add only the requested change.

help.concept: Project steps are connected. Preserve earlier deliverables and add one useful new piece of work.
help.hint_1: Use ls or find to check the current workspace before changing it.
help.hint_2: Do not delete files from earlier steps unless the prompt explicitly asks you to clean up a temporary file.

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.title: Back up the agenda
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.prompt: Before anyone cleans up the workspace, save a copy of the agenda. Copy `community-file-room/agenda/agenda.txt` to `community-file-room/backups/agenda.txt`.
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.hint: This is a cumulative project step. Start from the previous workspace and add only the requested change.

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.title: Create a review summary
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.prompt: The next volunteer needs a short review note after you check the agenda and guest list. Create `community-file-room/handoff/review-summary.txt` as that summary file.
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.hint: This is a cumulative project step. Start from the previous workspace and add only the requested change.

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.prompt: Finish the event handoff by removing the temporary scratch file from the inbox and creating `community-file-room/handoff/READY.txt` so the workspace clearly shows it is ready.

community_file_room_handoff_review_summa.content: Agenda and guest list reviewed for handoff

capstone-synopsis.title: Community File Room Handoff
capstone-synopsis.bodyMarkdown:
You are the final file-room helper for a community event. Inspect the inbox, sort important files, back up the agenda, review the handoff, remove temporary clutter, and leave a ready marker.

You will complete this as connected project steps. Each step starts from the previous working workspace, so do not delete earlier deliverables.
